title: Radio Buttons (16x)
description: Up to 16 radio buttons, only one output can be active at a time. For example, pulse at input (I3) activates (O3).

inputs.description: Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Disables all inputs when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Maximum number of selectable outputs. Example: Max=4 -> only outputs 1-4 can be activated via block inputs. In the user interface, all labeled outputs can be activated regardless of this setting.
'All-off' (0) is skipped when switching with +/- when On. Applies only to object inputs, not to the buttons in the user interface.
